title: Syndesis: an evidence-concordant, interaction-constrained workflow for EGFR ATP-site analog design
description: Reproducible, leakage-audited, structure-based workflow that accepts EGFR ATP-site analog candidates only when docked pose, interaction fingerprint, a leakage-controlled pose-confidence model, and short MD pose-stability agree, operationalizing and detecting docking-score hacking. Includes an LLM-agent vs rule-based analog-design feasibility comparison. Source-only release; generated data, trajectories, model weights, and vendored third-party tools are excluded.
